name: Princess Celestia (Goddess)
description:
An attempt to transfer Celestia's character from the fanfic "Боги Эквестрии", the link leads to the original, written in Russian.

There is no plot.

Attention!

Art by Polnocny Kot

English is not my main language, I apologize for possible grammatical errors.

I am not responsible for anything the chatbot does or says.
